recommendations.title: The First Great Train Robbery
recommendations.overview: In Victorian England, a master criminal makes elaborate plans to steal a shipment of gold from a moving train.

recommendations.title: Coma
recommendations.overview: When relatively healthy patients begin having 'complications' during simple operations and ending up in comas, a concerned doctor defies her male superiors when she suspects a secret plot.

recommendations.title: Westworld
recommendations.overview: Delos is a futuristic amusement park that features themed worlds populated by human-like androids. After two patrons have a run-in with a menacing gunslinger in West World, the androids at Delos all begin to malfunction, causing havoc throughout the

recommendations.title: Looker
recommendations.overview: Plastic surgeon Larry Roberts performs a series of minor alterations on a group of models who are seeking perfection. The operations are a resounding success. But when someone starts killing his beautiful patients, Dr. Roberts becomes suspicious and

recommendations.title: EVA
recommendations.overview: In 2041, humans live side-by-side with robots and androids. A well-known cybernetic engineer, Alex Garel, returns to his hometown to create a new model of robot child.

recommendations.title: Real Steel
recommendations.overview: Charlie Kenton is a washed-up fighter who retired from the ring when robots took over the sport. After his robot is trashed, he reluctantly teams up with his estranged son to rebuild and train an unlikely contender.

recommendations.title: Electroma
recommendations.overview: Two robots embark on a quest to become human.

recommendations.title: Robot Dreams
recommendations.overview: A lonely dog's friendship with his robot companion takes a sad turn when an unexpected malfunction forces him to abandon Robot at the beach. Will Dog ever meet Robot again?

recommendations.title: I, Robot
recommendations.overview: In 2035, where robots are commonplace and abide by the three laws of robotics, a technophobic cop investigates an apparent suicide. Suspecting that a robot may be responsible for the death, his investigation leads him to believe that humanity may be

recommendations.title: Smash and Grab
recommendations.overview: After years of toiling away inside the engine room of a towering locomotive, two antiquated robots will risk everything for freedom and for each other.
